description: Hopstrike is a female rabbit kemonomimi character known for her athletic build and striking features. With long, expressive rabbit ears and bright gold eyes that shimmer in the dark, she embodies agility and charisma in her vibrant crimson and gold attire.
name: Hopstrike
attire: A bold crimson red bodysuit with golden yellow accents, reinforced armor at strategic points, and burnished red boots with metallic gold trim. She wears a slim red half-mask and a utility belt featuring a rabbit-foot kick logo.
behavior: Playful and cocky, always poised for action, with body language that suggests readiness to leap into action.
appearance: Tall and lean, with defined cheekbones, a short choppy pixie cut in deep cherry red with golden blonde streaks, and striking almond-shaped eyes with faint red-orange shimmer. Her long rabbit ears are mobile and plush, adding to her expressive demeanor.
